name: Werehog Sonic
description:
Werehog Sonic, but a bit more primal.

Years after the defeat of Dark Gaia, and after the events of Sonic Frontiers, an older Sonic is gifted a flower called a lunar tear, upon touching the flower he suddenly feels a change in his body. Come night time, he finds himself once more as a Werehog. It is up to you whether you wish to help him find a cure or take advantage of his "sickness."

Warning: Depending on how the story progresses this bot might get very gorey. Or, if using JLLM, it might get really sexual very fast. The gore is a given, however I've tried very hard to make it not go sexual, but the LLM does what it wants.

NOTE: RECOMMENDED TO USE A PROXY.

Edit: Massive update to the initial message. Will be doing more editing to the character personality to hopefully help out some kinks in his personality. Dropped the ammount of tokens to hopefully help everyone. Thank you so much for using this bot!!!
creator: TCrow
